steps.title: Warm-up: Let's Revision
steps.description: Read 5 Let's sentences from yesterday's notes or think of 5 new ones — say them aloud.

steps.title: Today's Lesson: Use of Let's
steps.description: Read all 8 lesson sections carefully. Pay special attention to Let's not (negative) and Let us (formal).

steps.title: Vocabulary Power
steps.description: Read through today's 100 vocabulary words. Repeat the example sentences for at least 20 words aloud.

steps.title: Practice Questions Sprint
steps.description: Attempt at least 50 of today's 100 practice questions. Focus on negative and formal forms.

steps.title: Speaking Drill
steps.description: Go through 4 speaking drill sets. Say each sentence aloud 3 times. Pay attention to pronunciation guide.
